tim/engine/lexer

  • Index
Search:
Group by:

    • Lexer

        error
      • error(l: var Lexer; msg: string)

Types

Lexer = object
  input*: string
  pos*, line*, col*: int
  current*: char
  strbuf*: string
TimLexerError = object of CatchableError
TokenKind = enum
  tkEof, tkIdentifier, tkInteger, tkFloat, tkString, tkPlus, tkMinus,
  tkAsterisk, tkDivide, tkMod, tkCaret, tkLC, tkRC, tkLP, tkRP, tkLB, tkRB,
  tkDot, tkId, tkTernary, tkExc, tkNe, tkAssign, tkEq, tkColon, tkComma,
  tkScolon, tkGt, tkGte, tkLt, tkLte, tkAmp, tkAndAnd, tkPipe, tkOrOr,
  tkBacktick, tkSqString, tkCase = "case", tkOf = "of", tkIf = "if",
  tkElif = "elif", tkElse = "else", tkAnd = "and", tkFor = "for",
  tkWhile = "while", tkIn = "in", tkOr = "or", tkBool, tkLitObject, tkAt,
  tkImport, tkSnippetHtml, tkSnippetJs, tkSnippetYaml, tkSnippetCSS,
  tkSnippetJson, tkSnippetMarkdown, tkPlaceholder, tkViewLoader, tkClient,
  tkEnd, tkInclude, tkDo, tkFn = "fn", tkFunc = "func", tkMacro = "macro",
  tkIterator = "iterator", tkYield = "yield", tkComponent, tkVar = "var",
  tkConst = "const", tkType = "type", tkReturnCmd = "return",
  tkDiscardCmd = "discard", tkBreakCmd = "break", tkContinueCmd = "continue",
  tkIdentVar, tkIdentVarSafe, tkStatic, tkEcho = "echo", tkComment, tkDoc,
  tkNil = "nil", tkUnknown
TokenTuple = tuple[kind: TokenKind, value: string, line: int, col: int,
                   pos: int, wsno: int]

Procs

proc error(l: var Lexer; msg: string) {....raises: [TimLexerError, ValueError],
                                        tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc getToken(lex: var Lexer): TokenTuple {....raises: [TimLexerError, ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newLexer(input: string): Lexer {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc nextToken(lex: var Lexer): TokenTuple {.
    ...raises: [TimLexerError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
